name: Georgia Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine catsup, vinegar, oil, Worcestershire sauce, brown sugar, mustard, and garlic.
2. Squeeze the juice from one lemon into the sauce and add half of the lemon shell.
3. Heat slowly for about 10 minutes. The sauce does not need to boil, but heating will blend the flavors.
4. Use sparingly as a basting sauce for fresh pork, ham, ribs, or chicken. Additional sauce can be heated and served as a table sauce. Makes about 3 cups.
